title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, King Harald, Children, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strong should look out for the weak! Now go and apologize!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why haven't you cleaned your plate?

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Do you hate my cooking that much?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times have I told you not to take your father's sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hate you grandpa!! You and your savage pirate crew stink!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't protect you if you lie to me, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you bring my homework with you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I forgot it on purpose!! I didn't do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stop you from moving, but I can do this much at least...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But if you don't let go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's okay... we'll be fine!! I just know it, we'll be saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm sorry I said you were scary!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't mind being scary! Your fierce mommy lives to protect you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it must be nice... having parents like these...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
